[IMPLEMENTATION OF GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES ON SCIKIT-LEARN LOAD DIGITS DATASET WITH CROSS-VALIDATION AND HYPERPARAMETER TUNING]  
[COMPARISON OF PERFORMANCE BETWEEN GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES AND MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODELS]

[ERROR PREVENTION AND VALIDATION OF MODEL PERFORMANCE]  

[IMPLEMENTATION OF GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES ON SCIKIT-LEARN LOAD DIGITS DATASET WITH CROSS-VALIDATION AND HYPERPARAMETER TUNING]  
GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES IS IMPLEMENTED ON THE SCIKIT-LEARN LOAD DIGITS DATASET TO EVALUATE其 PERFORMANCE. CROSS-VALIDATION IS PERFORMED USING K-FOLD CROSS-VALIDATION WITH K=5. HYPERPARAMETER TUNING IS PERFORMED USING GRID SEARCH CV TO OPTIMIZE THE MODEL PARAMETERS. THE MODEL IS TRAINED AND EVALUATED USING THE TRAINING SET AND TEST SET RESPECTIVELY. THE MODEL IS COMPARED TO MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES FOR PERFORMANCE BASED ON ACCURACY AND F1 SCORE.  

[COMPARISON OF PERFORMANCE BETWEEN GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES AND MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODELS]  
THE PERFORMANCE OF GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES IS COMPARED TO MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES USING THE SAME DATASET AND SAME EVALUATION METRICS (ACCURACY AND F1 SCORE). THE GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES MODEL SHOWS A HIGHER ACCURACY ON THE TEST SET COMPARED TO MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES. THE MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL SHOWS A HIGHER F1 SCORE ON THE TRAINING SET. THE GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES MODEL SHOWS A BETTER PERFORMANCE ON DATA WITH HIGH VARIANCE.  

[ROLE DEFINITION AND CONSTRAINTS FOR MODEL IMPLEMENTATION]  
THE ROLE OF THE MODEL IS TO CLASSIFY DIGITS INTO THEIR CORRESPONDING NUMBERS USING GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES. THE CONSTRAINTS INCLUDE USING SCIKIT-LEARN'S LOAD DIGITS DATASET, PERFORMING CROSS-VALIDATION WITH K=5, AND USING GRID SEARCH CV FOR HYPERPARAMETER TUN
